subject: PATIENT
heading: HISTORY OF PRESENT ILLNESS:__page_no__1
text: history of present illness: patient is a 78-year-old filipino female with past medical history of hypertension, varicose veins, chronic pedal edema developed ulceration of her legs bilaterally right> left and was evaluated outpatient by dr.hifumi general surgeon and apparently unna boot was applied which was changed weekly. patient's wound did not appear to improve and did not have significant pain and was having drainage from wound send significant cellulitis was referred to er for hospitalization iv antibiotics. patient denies diabetes renal failure or liver disease. patient underwent cta aortoiliac with runoff which was negative for significant vascular disease

[provider_name] general surgeon and apparently unna boot was applied which was changed weekly. patient's wound did not appear to improve and did not have significant pain and was having drainage from wound send significant cellulitis was referred to er for hospitalization iv antibiotics. patient denies diabetes renal failure or liver disease. patient underwent cta aortoiliac with runoff which was negative for significant vascular disease

heading: HOSPITAL COURSE:__page_no__18
text: hospital course: procedures and treatment provided: ct aortoiliac with runoff patient is a 78-year-old filipino female with past medical history of hypertension, history of leg wounds status post skin graft in 2022, varicose veins, chronic pedal edema developed ulceration of her legs bilaterally right> left and was evaluated outpatient by dr.[provider_name] general surgeon and apparently unna boot was applied which was changed weekly. patient's wound did not appear to improve and did not have significant pain and was having drainage from wound send significant cellulitis was referred to er for hospitalization iv antibiotics. patient denies diabetes renal failure or liver disease. patient underwent cta aortoiliac with runoff which was negative for significant vascular disease and noted bilateral varicose veins

subject: PATIENT
heading: History of Present Illness :: 1. HIGH RISK__page_no__19
text: history of present illness 1. high risk a 77yo filipino lady accompanied by her grand daughter for the ov today. she went to urgent care 2 weeks ago for increasing lower back pain and after a "pain shot, she discharged home. per family, no labs or xr done. she is not taking norco. she did not fall, have dizzy, weakness to legs, foot drop, and change of bladder/bowel habits. she has a healing chronic venous ulcer on lle and grand daughter reports no discharge/draining. since discharge, she needs assistance with transfer and is able to ambulate using fww. today, there is no sob, chest pain, n/v, abdominal pain, back pain, and leg weakness.

text: history of present illness 1. high risk a 77yo filipino lady accompanied by her grand daughter for the ov today. she went to urgent care 2 weeks ago for increasing lower back pain and after a "pain shot, she discharged home. per family, no labs or xr done. she is not taking norco. she did not fall, have dizzy, weakness to legs, foot drop, and change of bladder/bowel habits. she has a healing chronic venous ulcer on lle and grand daughter reports no discharge/draining. since discharge, she needs assistance with transfer and is able to ambulate using fww. today, there is no sob, chest pain, n/v, abdominal pain, back pain, and leg weakness.
